Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lichborn]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Lichborn people have gray skin and eyes that shine with green light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — Lichborn find hostile hellscapes to be home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The opponent in the fighter was an older Lichborn man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Lichborn have specific marks on their eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — Lichborn are almost universally beautiful by human standards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Lichborn is a type of person or cadet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Lichborn is a system that exports thought-conduction alloys.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Lichborn are at war with the Karoshans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Lichborn is a homeworld.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Sola possesses the eyes of a healthy Lichborn.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — The Lichborn have been at war with Karosha for generations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Moonmaster is a half-Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Lichborn is a heritage or race that Moonmaster possesses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer considers the possibility that his savior might be a Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 13''' — Lichborn are a group of people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — The Lichborn is a woman wearing Aethertech armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — A Lichborn man was present during the encounter.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Lichborn is a species or type of person with gray skin and black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Lichborn are one of the five species of intelligent beings in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — A Lichborn woman arrives at the landing site.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Lichborn is a type of being that can survive certain levels of damage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Lichborn is a type of being or race.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — Lichborn are among the types of people depicted in arena fighter statues.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — A Lichborn royal drama was being displayed on a holographic screen.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The Lichborn have their homeworld on Dornoth IV.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — The Lichborn have begun mining operations in the Grand Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — The Lichborn are a fleet that emerged from a Subspace warp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Lichborn is a group that manufactures life-pods and ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Lichborn fleet is capable of taking Ark anywhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — A Lichborn woman with gray-streaked hair is present in the hangar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Sola has a green Lichborn eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — Nera Jesh is a Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Lichborn have a history of power armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Lichborn are a species with gray skin and near-flawless looks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Lichborn can be angry and encircle others.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
